name: @nebutra/provider-registry
description: Domain provider registry with a zero-config local default

requires: A local OpenAI-compatible or Ollama-style endpoint for the default provider
gaps: Local provider trait is not a replacement for Vercel AI SDK/provider SDK execution
No tenant-aware key pool, budget enforcement, or provider health persistence
Production consumers should use @nebutra/agents or the API gateway upstream pool
nebutra.summary: Provider trait and registry without routing or cache
